response: The Mobile Team sent a mobile app crash rate alert stating that the app’s crash rate spiked to 2.3%—well above the 0.5% threshold—after yesterday’s release, with a null pointer error in the notification handler causing crashes only on Android 12+ devices while the iOS version of the app remains completely unaffected. The team has already merged a fix for the crashing bug to the app’s main codebase and submitted an emergency release request to the Google Play Store to resolve the elevated crash issue for all affected Android users.
